spec.title: Podman containers
spec.description: Overview of podman containers on the homelab host (prometheus-podman-exporter).

spec.expr: count(podman_container_state{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"}) - count(podman_container_state{job=~"$job", instance=~"$instance"} == 2) or vector(0)

spec.title: CPU cores
spec.description: Total CPU cores used across all containers.

spec.title: Containers
spec.description: Per-container overview. State/health value-mapped; memory is absolute RSS (mem_limit reports host RAM under cgroups-split, so no % vs limit).

spec.title: Container state
spec.description: State over time; gaps/transitions reveal restarts.
